category_sources: Official repository README describes Link Grammar as a natural language parser.
source_facts.description says Carnegie Mellon University's link grammar parser.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses Link Grammar Parser.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the best official documentation surface found and includes usage, build, and project information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/opencog/link-grammar; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the Link Grammar parser.
